reasoning: NZDCHF is showing bearish signals. RSI values on daily, weekly and monthly charts are below 50, indicating a downward trend. The price is below the moving average on all timeframes except 1H, further confirming the bearish outlook. While the 1H RSI suggests potential short-term upward movement, the overall trend points towards a potential sell. Therefore, Sell has the highest percentage. Holding is considered a safer approach than buying into a downtrend and short upward on 1H
